title: scleria junciformis
intro: Scleria junciformis, also known as the rice grass or thread rush, is a type of aquatic plant belonging to the family Cyperaceae. Traditionally, Scleria junciformis has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support kidney function. Scleria junciformis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, as well as being used in traditional Chinese medicine to create various remedies.
